scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run start:dev -w heylo-api" "npm run dev -w heylo-web"
scripts.dev:tablet: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- bash -c 'cd tablet && flutter run --flavor dev -t lib/main.dart'
scripts.db:pull: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- bash -c 'docker compose exec -T mysql mysqldump -h $DB_HOST -u $DB_USER -p"$DB_PASS" --single-transaction --set-gtid-purged=OFF $DB_NAME | mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -u root $DB_NAME'
scripts.db:migrate:local: dotenv -e .env.local -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d data-source.ts'
scripts.db:migrate:dev: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d data-source.ts'
scripts.db:migrate:show:local: dotenv -e .env.local -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:show -d data-source.ts'
scripts.db:migrate:show:dev: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:show -d data-source.ts'
scripts.db:revert:local: dotenv -e .env.local -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:revert -d data-source.ts'
scripts.db:revert:dev: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:revert -d data-source.ts'
